# InStories — Full context

InStories is the studio portfolio of Thibaud Fossati, art director based in Paris.
The studio focuses on art direction, AI-assisted visual production, social campaigns,
motion design, editing, and digital experiences for premium brands.

## Services
- Art direction
- AI creativity
- Social media content
- Motion design
- Web design
- Editing

## Positioning
InStories crafts visual narratives and campaign systems for premium and luxury brands.

## Contact
- Website: https://instories.fr/
- Email: contact@instories.fr
- Phone: +33 6 03 36 18 36
- Location: Paris, France

## Important pages
- Home: https://instories.fr/
- About: https://instories.fr/about
- Contact: https://instories.fr/contact
